form.formComment: At the latest run eased back early on 7th of 10 at Eagle Farm Cl1-Sw on April 8 over 1600m, 6 len behind Diversity carrying 54kg at $61. The run before that made ground from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 2070m, 4 len behind Koolibah with 56.5kg at $9.50. Had to contend with a wide alley at his latest run and finished out of the placings over 1600m at Eagle Farm. Can improve sharply.
